advantages.title: Advantages
advantages.advantagesAfterText: We shape our casino experience around modern entertainment, accessible service, verified gaming standards, and a connected relationship between our physical venues and digital platform. Our guests can engage with a brand that presents land-based casinos, gaming halls, online casino products, live casino, slots, poker, support channels, and responsible gaming information through one recognizable Emotiva ecosystem

history.title: About the Casino
history.description1: At Emotiva, we define our casino brand through modern, accessible, safe, and connected entertainment. Our official platform brings together live casino, casino games, slots, and poker.
items: Emotiva has more than 50 years of experience in leisure and entertainment.
Our brand includes more than 120 gaming halls across six Spanish autonomous communities.
Our physical casino locations are in Albacete, Ciudad Real, and Talavera de la Reina.
history.description2: Our physical casino presence includes three casinos located in Albacete, Ciudad Real, and Talavera de la Reina. These spaces are presented by Emotiva as venues designed to offer first-level experiences, supported by our philosophy of innovative, modern, and welcoming environments.
history.description3: We also support our guests with clear contact options, including email, phone, and chat, and we maintain an active commitment to safer gaming. Our responsible gaming information includes deposit limits, self-exclusion tools, customer history access, and the Poker for Fun initiative.

customHtml.title: Emotiva Casino — Online Atmosphere, Game Areas and Entertainment
customHtml.description:
Emotiva Casino is our modern online casino where energy, comfort and a vivid digital atmosphere come together in one gaming space. We create an experience where players can move from slots to live casino, from blackjack to poker, from video bingo to crash games without delays or unnecessary steps. Our casino is available online every day, giving each user the freedom to choose the right time, pace and entertainment format. In live casino, we focus on presence: professional dealers, studio-style presentation, smooth streams and intuitive controls create the feeling of a real table. The slots section includes popular machines, Megaways titles, bonus-buy games, classic formats, themed releases and provider-based collections. For players who enjoy competition, our poker area brings tournaments, cash games, missions and ranking activities. Emotiva Casino does not require a hotel, travel or a physical bar because we bring lounge-style leisure and evening entertainment directly into the online account. Emotiva Club adds a reward layer through E-Coins that can be exchanged for bonuses, gifts, raffles and VIP-style experiences. We regularly launch welcome offers, cashback, weekly bonuses, poker campaigns, seasonal events and special game promotions. Support is available for account, payment, bonus and gameplay questions through convenient contact channels. At Emotiva Casino, we focus on speed, choice, safety and a confident gaming atmosphere. Our casino is built for players who want rich online leisure in a flexible and dynamic format.


Zone Days Hours
Emotiva Casino Online Lobby Daily 24/7
Slots and Bonus Games Daily 24/7
Live Casino, Roulette and Blackjack Daily 24/7, depending on live table availability
Poker Cash Games Daily 24/7
Poker Tournaments and Missions Scheduled Shown in the tournament lobby
Emotiva Club and Promotions Daily 24/7

Emotiva Casino — Support Team, Languages, Payments and Withdrawals

At Emotiva Casino, our service is built around clear communication, fast assistance and confident guidance at every stage of the player journey. Our support team helps with registration, account access, verification, bonuses, deposits, withdrawals and gameplay questions. We keep assistance practical: players receive useful steps rather than vague explanations. Security is an essential part of our approach, so identity confirmation, payment ownership checks or additional account details may be requested when needed. This helps protect the user balance, process payouts correctly and maintain a fair gaming environment.


The main interface and service language at Emotiva Casino is Spanish, while written support requests make it easy to describe a question and receive a precise answer for the right section. For English-language users, we adapt wording so the cashier, bonus terms, game areas and account actions remain easy to understand. We focus on players who value clarity, fast access to information and straightforward procedures. Inside the account, users can view game areas, balance, bonuses, promotions and available payment actions. This keeps the casino experience simple and logical even during a first visit.


For deposits and withdrawals, Emotiva Casino supports popular payment methods such as bank transfer, credit and debit cards, Neteller, Skrill and AstroPay, with the exact available options shown in the account cashier. We use secure payment routes so users can fund their balance and request payouts with confidence. In the online format, ATMs and exchange desks are replaced by the digital cashier, where players can see real-money funds, bonus balance, limits and available transaction methods. The user selects a preferred option, enters the amount and follows the interface instructions. Payment information is processed through secure channels, while withdrawals are sent through an eligible verified method.


A withdrawal at Emotiva Casino begins with the available cash balance and the completion of any active bonus conditions, if a promotion was used. Real-money funds can be requested for payout, while bonus-related funds become available after the specific offer rules are met. For a first withdrawal or larger transaction, we may request documents to confirm identity and payment-method ownership. We aim to process requests efficiently, while the final arrival time depends on the selected payment method and completed verification. For recreational players, gambling winnings are generally not treated as taxable income, although professional gambling activity or income earned from later investing winnings may have separate tax implications.


Emotiva Casino — Loyalty Programme, E-Coins and Emotiva Levels

At Emotiva Casino, our loyalty programme is designed to turn player activity into real gaming value. Emotiva Club allows users to earn E-Coins and use them for bonuses, gifts, raffles and VIP-style experiences. We keep the club system easy to understand: players join activities, complete tasks, explore game areas and unlock more opportunities inside the Emotiva ecosystem. For poker users, Emotiva Levels adds a separate status structure where progress depends on VP accumulation. Every participant starts from the base level and can move up through regular play. The level path is transparent: Bronze, Silver, Gold, Platinum and Elite. The higher the level, the stronger the reward, including freerolls, tournament money and rakeback. Progress follows a clear mechanic where 1 unit of rake equals 10 VP. To join Emotiva Levels, players use the LEVELUP promotional code in the cashier. Rewards are credited after the period when the user meets the level requirements. Emotiva Club works for a broad audience, while Emotiva Levels is especially valuable for active poker players. Together, these mechanics make our loyalty programme flexible, rewarding and motivating.


Registration Conditions

  • • Active Emotiva Casino account — the basic requirement for access to club benefits.
  • • Accurate personal details — required for security, bonuses and withdrawal processing.
  • • Account verification — may be required for rewards and payouts.
  • • Emotiva Club — participation allows players to earn E-Coins through activity and use them for bonuses and gifts.
  • • Emotiva Levels — poker players activate participation with the LEVELUP code in the cashier promotional code field.
  • • One player, one account, with no duplicate profiles or transferred bonus rights.

Emotiva Levels and How to Reach Them

  • • Bronze — 0 VP: the starting level for all participants, with access to a monthly Bronze Freeroll offering 1,000 guaranteed tournament money.
  • • Silver — 1,000 VP: a level for players who reach the first meaningful poker activity threshold, with access to a Silver Freeroll offering 2,000 guaranteed tournament money.
  • • Gold — 5,000 VP: a regular-play level with 15% rakeback.
  • • Platinum — 10,000 VP: an advanced level for active poker users with 20% rakeback.
  • • Elite — 50,000 VP: the highest programme level with 33% rakeback.
  • • VP mechanic: 1 unit of rake equals 10 VP, so status growth is directly connected to poker activity.

Bonuses and Benefits

  • • E-Coins: club currency used for bonuses, gifts, raffles and VIP-style experiences.
  • • Welcome activity: starter benefits for new club participants.
  • • Daily challenges: daily tasks that help users collect additional E-Coins regularly.
  • • Weekly activities: predictions, missions and promotional formats with extra reward potential.
  • • Freeroll tournaments: Bronze and Silver levels unlock monthly events with 1,000 and 2,000 tournament money prize pools.
  • • Up to 33% rakeback: Gold, Platinum and Elite levels return part of the rake after the reward period.
  • • VIP-style experiences: E-Coins can be used for special moments, events and personal rewards.

Emotiva Casino — Bonuses, Winnings, Special Offers and Seasonal Promotions

At Emotiva Casino, we develop bonuses as a separate part of the gaming experience that complements loyalty and makes every session more rewarding. Our offers cover casino games, slots, roulette, blackjack, poker, cashback, tournaments, missions and seasonal campaigns. New users can start with welcome bonuses that add extra balance or tournament money. Active players can access weekly offers, cashback formats, ranking promotions and promo codes. We keep bonuses varied so every user can choose an offer that fits a preferred game category. For slots, deposit bonuses, bonus-buy games and themed campaigns create extra value. For live casino, players can use offers connected to roulette and blackjack. Poker users receive missions, freerolls, leaderboards and special series. Cashback helps return part of eligible losses and keeps the balance more flexible. Seasonal campaigns create new reasons to visit the casino, check promotions and join events. Each offer includes dates, limits, wagering rules and eligible games. We make Emotiva Casino promotions dynamic, clear and focused on real player interest.


Welcome and Deposit Bonuses

  • • 50 no-deposit bonus: after verification, players can activate VIBRA50 and receive a starter bonus for exploring the casino.
  • • Triple Welcome Bonus up to 1,800: a package across the first 3 deposits, spreading welcome value across several stages.
  • • Welcome Casino up to 500: a deposit bonus for slots and the casino section.
  • • Welcome Roulette up to 500: an offer for users who choose roulette and live roulette.
  • • Welcome Blackjack up to 500: a starting bonus for blackjack and card-game fans.
  • • Double First Deposit up to 200: a promotion where the first deposit is matched and released gradually through VIP points.

Cashback and Regular Offers

  • • Daily Cashback up to 20%: a daily return on eligible losses for extra balance flexibility.
  • • Weekly Cashback up to 10% with no wagering: a weekly cashback format that can be used directly in future play.
  • • Double Weekly Extra up to 1,200: a recurring deposit bonus for users who want to strengthen their balance every week.
  • • Birthday Bonus up to 500: a celebration offer that can double a birthday deposit.

Poker Promotions and Tournament Prizes

  • • Starter Pack Series 10 no-deposit bonus: a poker starter bonus for entering the tournament environment.
  • • Por la Cara up to 500 tournament money: a poker welcome offer activated with the PORLACARA promo code.
  • • Emotiva Missions: more than 15 missions with a reward for each completed task.
  • • Caza al runneador up to 1,000 tournament money: a weekly cash-game ranking with points and prizes.
  • • El rey de la pista up to 1,000 tournament money: a tournament competition where rewards depend on position.
  • • Rookie del Mes: every 15 days, new poker players can compete for 10 major tournament tickets or 10 bonuses of 60 tournament money.
  • • Weekly Social Draw up to 200: a draw for active community and social participants.

customHtml_2.title: Emotiva Casino — Popular Games, Live Casino, Slots and Poker
customHtml_2.description:
At Emotiva Casino, we shape the game catalogue so every player can quickly find a title that matches mood, pace and experience level. Our lobby includes slots, live casino, roulette, blackjack, poker, video bingo, crash games and fast number-based formats. Slots suit users who enjoy bright themes, bonus rounds, free spins, multipliers and dynamic visuals. Live casino is created for those who value real dealers, studio atmosphere and the feeling of a genuine table. Blackjack appeals to card-game fans who enjoy strategy, quick decisions and clear round structure. Roulette remains one of the most popular areas thanks to simple rules, varied betting options and live formats. The poker area fits players who want tournaments, cash tables, missions and competitive momentum. Video bingo adds a more relaxed format with simple rules and colourful themes. Crash games are made for short sessions, instant decisions and fast pacing. We work with major game providers to maintain variety across mechanics, styles and formats. This makes Emotiva Casino a convenient space for casual play, evening live entertainment and active poker sessions. Each section helps users choose a personal entertainment scenario.


Popular Slots

  • • Starburst: a bright slot with simple mechanics, fast spins and a recognisable visual style.
  • • Amazing Link Zeus Boost: a dynamic game with a mythological theme and strong bonus potential.
  • • El Orbe de Poseidón: a sea-themed slot with expressive graphics and an adventure mood.
  • • Dead or Alive 3 Wanted: a popular high-volatility slot for players who enjoy intense bonus rounds.
  • • El Bandido Explosivo 2: an energetic game with vivid presentation and quick pacing.
  • • Jax Fortune y El Amuleto del Jaguar: an adventure slot with jungle atmosphere and treasure-hunt energy.

Live Casino and Table Games

Video Bingo, Crash Games and Poker

Emotiva Casino — Minimum and Maximum Bets by Game Area

At Emotiva Casino, stake ranges depend on the selected game, provider, live table, tournament schedule and account settings. We make selection convenient by showing available limits before play begins, so users can choose a format that matches their style. Lower stakes suit a relaxed introduction to the casino, while higher limits fit players who prefer more active sessions. Exact values are always displayed inside the selected game, live table or poker lobby.

Emotiva Casino — Events, Live Entertainment, Tournaments and Night-Style Play

At Emotiva Casino, events are built around constant online momentum: poker tournaments, live casino, missions, leaderboards, seasonal promotions and game campaigns create a rich activity calendar. We keep entertainment varied so users can choose a relaxed, dynamic or competitive format. In one evening, a player can start with slots, move to live roulette, play blackjack, enter a poker tournament and finish with a crash game. This format suits users who enjoy not only betting, but also goals, progress, rewards and themed events.


The poker area holds a special place in our event system. It includes Emotiva Missions, Caza al runneador, El rey de la pista, Rookie del Mes, cash games, tournament series and ranking mechanics. Players can complete tasks, earn points, compete for tournament money, tickets and additional rewards. This turns poker at Emotiva Casino into a full competitive environment with regular reasons to return to the lobby.


The night-style format in our casino is created through a digital lounge experience where live tables, show games, fast slots, blackjack, roulette and tournaments work as one entertainment ecosystem. We do not limit users to a physical nightclub because the evening casino lounge atmosphere is available directly in the account. Live casino adds the feeling of a real studio, while slots and crash games keep the rhythm fast. Each user chooses the mood: relaxed video bingo, active live dealer play, poker competition or a short dynamic round.


Emotiva Casino Entertainment

  • • Live Casino: roulette, blackjack and show formats with live dealers and studio atmosphere.
  • • Poker tournaments: regular tournaments, leaderboards and events for different experience levels.
  • • Emotiva Missions: more than 15 poker missions with rewards for each completed task.
  • • Caza al runneador: a weekly ranking promotion with prizes up to 1,000 tournament money.
  • • El rey de la pista: a tournament promotion with bonuses up to 1,000 tournament money based on position.
  • • Rookie del Mes: an event for new poker players with tickets and bonuses.
  • • Slots campaigns: themed collections, game weeks and additional slot offers.
  • • Seasonal promotions: holiday, weekend and special campaigns.
  • • Crash Games: fast entertainment for short sessions and instant decisions.
  • • Video Bingo: a relaxed format with simple rules and colourful presentation.
  • • Weekly Social Draw: raffles for active community participants.
  • • Night-style live lobby: an evening digital lounge atmosphere through live tables, show games and dynamic slots.

Emotiva Casino — Leisure, Lounge Comfort, Bars and Game Areas

Emotiva Casino is created as an online leisure space where players receive a casino experience as soon as they enter the account. We bring the atmosphere of a bar, gaming floor, lounge area and evening entertainment into a digital format. Users do not need to reserve a table, choose a hotel or plan travel because game areas, cashier, promotions, club rewards and support are available in one profile. This makes leisure flexible, allowing players to enjoy the casino at home, while travelling or from any comfortable setting.


For users who enjoy a bar-style atmosphere, we offer slots de bar, classic machines, fast games and vivid slot collections. These areas create a light, dynamic and accessible entertainment mood. Live Casino works as the central lounge zone, where roulette, blackjack and show games deliver live interaction and real-table energy. Poker Room adds a competitive layer, while missions, tournaments and rankings turn a regular game session into an event.


A hotel is not required in the online format because Emotiva Casino works as a digital leisure hub with round-the-clock access to entertainment. Users can choose a short slot session, relaxed video bingo, evening live dealer play or a poker tournament without changing a personal schedule. Emotiva Club strengthens the leisure experience through E-Coins, gifts, bonuses, raffles and VIP-style moments. We bring games, service, payments and promotions together in one account so every user can enjoy a complete and convenient leisure journey.


Emotiva Casino Leisure and Game Areas

  • • Slots de Bar: machine-style games with bar mood, fast rounds and classic rhythm.
  • • Main Slots Lobby: a broad selection of slots, Megaways, bonus games, new releases and popular hits.
  • • Poker Room: a space for cash games, tournaments, missions, rankings and poker promotions.
  • • Video Bingo Corner: a relaxed area for users who enjoy simple rules and steady pacing.

  • • Emotiva Club: a club space with E-Coins, gifts, raffles, bonuses and VIP-style experiences.
  • • Digital Cashier: a financial area for deposits, withdrawals, limits and balance checks.
  • • Support Desk: assistance with account, payment, bonus and gameplay questions.

items.title: What is Emotiva Casino?
items.answer: Emotiva Casino is part of the Emotiva brand, which presents a connected entertainment ecosystem that includes physical casino venues, gaming halls, and online gaming products such as live casino, casino games, slots, and poker.

items.title: How long has Emotiva been active in entertainment?
items.answer: Our brand has more than 50 years of experience in the leisure and entertainment sector.

items.title: What responsible gaming tools does Emotiva provide?
items.answer: We provide safer gaming information, deposit limits, access to customer history, self-exclusion options, and the Poker for Fun initiative as part of our responsible gaming commitment.
